headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 12, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 2-3 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, while the New York Yankees bounced back with a 6-2 win over the Baltimore Orioles. The Washington Nationals dominated the Cincinnati Reds 10-4, and the Colorado Rockies fell to the Pittsburgh Pirates 1-3. The Orioles also secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the Yankees.

Angel Martínez led the Angels' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance in their loss to the Guardians. Will Warren earned the win for the Yankees, pitching 5.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. Trent Grisham led the Yankees' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and 1 hit in 3 at-bats. Daylen Lile hit 3 home runs and drove in 4 runs for the Nationals in their win over the Reds.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, including Francisco Alvarez (New York Mets), Rhett Lowder (Cincinnati Reds), Drew Pomeranz (Los Angeles Angels), Dylan Beavers (Baltimore Orioles), Grant Wolfram (Baltimore Orioles), Jacob Wilson (Athletics), José Caballero (New York Yankees), and Sean Murphy (Atlanta Braves).

The Arizona Diamondbacks acquired Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-3 decision to the Cleveland Guardians in their latest matchup. Angel Martínez led the Angels' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Will Warren earning the win after pitching 5.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. Trent Grisham led the Yankees' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and 1 hit in 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Reds 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a decisive victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with a strong performance from their offense. Daylen Lile led the charge, hitting 3 home runs and driving in 4 runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 1-3 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 1-3 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Paul Skenes leading the Pirates' pitching effort. Skenes pitched 8.0 innings, striking out 10 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the New York Yankees, with Adley Rutschman and Coby Mayo leading the Orioles' offense. Kyle Bradish pitched a strong game for the Orioles, while Pete Alonso was the only Yankees player to have a notable performance.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-4 decision to the Cleveland Guardians, with Zach Neto and Angel Martínez leading the Angels' offense. Reid Detmers and Parker Messick were among the Angels' notable pitchers in the loss.

top_news.title: **Mets Catcher Sidelined with Injury**
top_news.summary: New York Mets catcher Francisco Alvarez has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right meniscus tear. The injury will keep Alvarez out of action for the time being.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers. The trade sent center fielder Alek Thomas to the Dodgers.
